action.reasoning: Observation: Best test acc 78.47%. Val acc ~60% (noisy labels cap it). Phase 2 overfits. Analysis: Need noise-robust approach. Will use cleanlab to identify clean samples, then train on filtered data. Also try longer phase 1 with stronger augmentation. Decision: Run cleanlab noise detection, then retrain with clean subset.
